positive: A stylized, mystical forest grove at twilight. The central focus is a grouping of whimsical forest spirits and fauna: glowing bioluminescent flora, elegant deer with crystalline antlers, and abstract fairy-like figures interacting with massive, detailed mushrooms. The scene should utilize strong backlighting and deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted with neon, magical light sources. Style: Intricate line art mixed with vibrant digital painting, reminiscent of stained glass and Japanese woodblock prints. Composition must be symmetrical and perfectly centered, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern repeat. High contrast silhouette, clean vector lines, flat lay presentation, studio quality print art, minimalist depth, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, artifacts, grain, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, noise, muted colors, photorealistic, logos, trademarks, cropped, messy background
